# Class: Orchestrator

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/orchestrator.ts:40](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/orchestrator.ts#L40)

Orchestrator for test infrastructure.
Integration: starts services via testcontainers.
E2E: runs full docker compose up.

### start()

```ts
start(): Promise<void>;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/orchestrator.ts:76](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/orchestrator.ts#L76)

Start declared services via testcontainers (integration mode).
Phase 1: start all containers in parallel (the slow part).
Phase 2: wire connections, healthcheck, and init sequentially (fast).

#### Returns

`Promise`\<`void`\>

***
